Action: Business Issuer creates a credential offer and transitions status to CANCELLED
Data:
- Credential type: unbound_example_sd_jwt
- Initial status transition to CANCELLED
- Management ID obtained
Expected Result: Credential status successfully changed to CANCELLED

Data:
- Management ID
- UpdateCredentialStatusRequestType.ISSUED

Action: Verify error response describes the failed state transition
Data:
- HTTP 400 error body
- Detail field containing state transition information
